data.title: Encryption Protocols
data.description: Netflix secures user data and video streams with advanced encryption protocols.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes TLS 1.3 for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Strict access controls and authentication processes to protect user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) and OAuth 2.0 standards for APIs.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Comprehensive strategies to prevent Distributed Denial-of-Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Implementation of AWS Shield Advanced and custom filtering rules.

data.title: Security Information and Event Management (SIEM)
data.description: Continuous monitoring and analysis of security threats.
data.technical_spec: Leveraging Splunk and AWS CloudTrail to aggregate and analyze logs.

data.title: Data Breach Response
data.description: A robust incident response plan to handle potential security breaches.
data.technical_spec: Regular drills and a dedicated incident response team using playbooks.
